judge_scores.reasoning: The response correctly attributes the establishment of the R$600 benefit to Bolsonaro and details the PEC 1/2022, while also explaining Lula's continuation of the program.
The response correctly attributes the establishment of the R$600 benefit to Bolsonaro under PEC 123/2022 and explains the transition to Lula's government.

The response correctly identifies Bolsonaro as the originator of the R$600 minimum, specifically citing the PEC (EC 123/2022) approved in July 2022 under the Auxílio Brasil program, and accurately explains that Lula maintained the value when relaunching as Bolsa Família.
